Code Secs 15610.310 And 15657.3; (2) Conversion; (3) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; (4) Adjudication Of Rights As To Personal Property Under Probate Code Sec 850, Et Seq.,Including An Award Of Double Damages And Attorney'S Fees Under Probate Code Sec 859; (5) Constructive Trust Under Civ. Code Sec 2223; And (6) Accounting.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Carl L. Jones, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Tara Gillespie, Petitioner.
Olga B. Kuzmina, Esq., via CourtCall, for Cynthia Jefferson, Respondent.

At the outset, Mr. Jones reports that the parties have reached a conditional settlement and requests a continuance of six (6) months to allow for completion of the terms of the settlement. Ms. Kuzmina agrees with the preceding.

The matter is continued to Oct-28-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A Status of Settlement is added for the same date. Counsel is requested to advise the court if the matter is fully resolved prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.
